characters.appearance: Young adult woman, medium build, fair complexion. She has blonde hair tied back in a ponytail and wears dark-rimmed glasses.
characters.demeanor: Focused on her task, slightly hesitant when speaking, but receptive and positive when corrected.

characters.appearance: Animated female character, fair complexion, wavy red hair.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: What are you doing?
Character A says: I am cooking my daughter.
Character B says: What? You are cooking your daughter!?
Character A says: No no, I mean making food! I am trying to speak English.
Character B says: Then say: "I am cooking for my daughter." Make 1000 mistakes here, I will never judge you.
Character A says: Phew. My daughter... she has 3.
Character B says: Say: "She is three years old." I analyze your exact level and build a plan just for you.
Character A says: I have many work today.
Character B says: Say: "I have a lot of work today." See? ChatGPT just gives text, but I make you speak.
Character A says: Who are you?
Character B says: I'm Miss Nova, your AI teacher on Supernova. I explain the logic in your own language.
Character B says: Stop passively watching videos, just practice 15 minutes a day!
Character A says: Amazing, let's start!
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hook: Relatable Indian-English error (cooking my daughter) grabs attention immediately.
- Payload: Lands privacy/no-judgment (b) and personalization (a) early during the correction loop.
- Payload: Integrates ChatGPT contrast and mother-tongue logic (g) before the tight close.
- Close: Negative time anchor (watching videos) + positive time anchor (15 mins/day) with no absolute guarantees.
